rules: Size the first tranche <= 1/3 of cash; declare the exits before the entry.
Never hold a spec through earnings.
The validated buy window: VIX >= 30 close-confirmed with credit clean.
Below a FALLING 200-day is a knife - depth counts, first touches don't.
